contents:
Require Import
  HoTT.Basics
  HoTT.Types
  HoTT.Universes.HSet
  HoTT.Spaces.Finite.Fin
  HoTT.Spaces.Finite.FinInduction
  HoTT.Spaces.Nat.Core.

(** Finite-dimensional sequence. It is often referred to as vector,
    but we call it finite sequence [FinSeq] to avoid confusion with
    vector from linear algebra.

    Note that the induction principle [finseq_]*)
Definition FinSeq@{u} (n : nat) (A : Type@{u}) : Type@{u} := Fin n -> A.
Definition fsnil {A : Type} : FinSeq 0 A := Empty_rec.
Definition path_fsnil `{Funext} {A : Type} (v : FinSeq 0 A) : fsnil = v.

goals.conclusion: fsnil = v
fsnil = v

contents: (** Add an element in the end of a finite sequence, [fscons'] and [fscons]. *)

Definition fscons' {A : Type} (n : nat) (a : A) (v : FinSeq (nat_pred n) A)
  : FinSeq n A
  := fun i =>  fin_rec (fun n => FinSeq (nat_pred n) A -> A)
                       (fun _ _ => a) (fun n' i _ v => v i) i v.

Definition fscons {A : Type} {n : nat} : A -> FinSeq n A -> FinSeq n.+1 A
  := fscons' n.+1.

(** Take the first element of a non-empty finite sequence,
    [fshead'] and [fshead]. *)

Definition fshead' {A} (n : nat) : 0 < n -> FinSeq n A -> A
  := match n with
     | 0 => fun N _ => Empty_rec (not_lt_zero_r _ N)
     | n'.+1 => fun _ v => v fin_zero
     end.
Definition fshead {A} {n : nat} : FinSeq n.+1 A -> A := fshead' n.+1 _.

Definition fshead'_beta_fscons' {A} n (N : n > 0) (a : A) (v : FinSeq (nat_pred n) A)
  : fshead' n N (fscons' n a v) = a.

goals.conclusion: fshead' n N (fscons' n a v) = a
fshead' n N (fscons' n a v) = a
fshead' n.+1 N (fscons' n.+1 a v) = a

contents:
Definition fshead_beta_fscons {A} {n} (a : A) (v : FinSeq n A)
  : fshead (fscons a v) = a.

goals.conclusion: fshead (fscons a v) = a
fshead (fscons a v) = a

contents: (** If the sequence is non-empty, then remove the first element. *)

Definition fstail' {A} (n : nat) : FinSeq n A -> FinSeq (nat_pred n) A
  := match n with
     | 0 => fun _ => Empty_rec
     | n'.+1 => fun v i => v (fsucc i)
     end.
(** Remove the first element from a non-empty sequence. *)
Definition fstail {A} {n : nat} : FinSeq n.+1 A -> FinSeq n A := fstail' n.+1.

Definition fstail'_beta_fscons' {A} n (a : A) (v : FinSeq (nat_pred n) A)
  : fstail' n (fscons' n a v) == v.

goals.conclusion: fstail' n (fscons' n a v) == v
fstail' n (fscons' n a v) == v
fstail' n (fscons' n a v) i = v i
fstail' n.+1 (fscons' n.+1 a v) i = v i

contents:
Definition fstail_beta_fscons `{Funext} {A} {n} (a : A) (v : FinSeq n A)
  : fstail (fscons a v) = v.

goals.conclusion: fstail (fscons a v) = v
fstail (fscons a v) = v
fstail (fscons a v) i = v i

contents:
(** A non-empty finite sequence is equal to [fscons] of head and tail,
    [path_expand_fscons'] and [path_expand_fscons]. *)

Lemma path_expand_fscons' {A : Type} (n : nat)
  (i : Fin n) (N : n > 0) (v : FinSeq n A)
  : fscons' n (fshead' n N v) (fstail' n v) i = v i.

goals.conclusion: fscons' n (fshead' n N v) (fstail' n v) i = v i
fscons' n (fshead' n N v) (fstail' n v) i = v i
fscons' n.+1 (fshead' n.+1 N v) (fstail' n.+1 v) fin_zero = v fin_zero
fscons' n.+1 (fshead' n.+1 N v) (fstail' n.+1 v) (fsucc i) = v (fsucc i)

hypotheses.type:
forall (N0 : n > 0) (v0 : FinSeq n A),
fscons' n (fshead' n N0 v0) (fstail' n v0) i = v0 i

goals.conclusion: fscons' n.+1 (fshead' n.+1 N v) (fstail' n.+1 v) fin_zero = v fin_zero
fscons' n.+1 (fshead' n.+1 N v) (fstail' n.+1 v) (fsucc i) = v (fsucc i)

hypotheses.type:
forall (N0 : n > 0) (v0 : FinSeq n A),
fscons' n (fshead' n N0 v0) (fstail' n v0) i = v0 i

contents:
Lemma path_expand_fscons `{Funext} {A} {n} (v : FinSeq n.+1 A)
  : fscons (fshead v) (fstail v) = v.

goals.conclusion: fscons (fshead v) (fstail v) = v
fscons (fshead v) (fstail v) = v
fscons (fshead v) (fstail v) i = v i

contents:
(** The following [path_fscons'] and [path_fscons] gives a way to construct
    a path between [fscons] finite sequences. They cooperate nicely with
    [path_expand_fscons'] and [path_expand_fscons]. *)

goals.conclusion: fscons' n a1 v1 i = fscons' n a2 v2 i

hypotheses.type: forall i0 : Fin (nat_pred n), v1 i0 = v2 i0

goals.conclusion: fscons' n a1 v1 i = fscons' n a2 v2 i

hypotheses.type: forall i0 : Fin (nat_pred n), v1 i0 = v2 i0

goals.conclusion: fscons' n.+1 a1 v1 fin_zero = fscons' n.+1 a2 v2 fin_zero

hypotheses.type: forall i : Fin (nat_pred n.+1), v1 i = v2 i

goals.conclusion: fscons' n.+1 a1 v1 (fsucc i) = fscons' n.+1 a2 v2 (fsucc i)

hypotheses.type: forall i0 : Fin (nat_pred n.+1), v1 i0 = v2 i0

forall v0 v3 : FinSeq (nat_pred n) A,
(forall i0 : Fin (nat_pred n), v0 i0 = v3 i0) ->
fscons' n a1 v0 i = fscons' n a2 v3 i

goals.conclusion: fscons' n.+1 a1 v1 fin_zero = fscons' n.+1 a2 v2 fin_zero

hypotheses.type: forall i : Fin (nat_pred n.+1), v1 i = v2 i

goals.conclusion: fscons' n.+1 a1 v1 (fsucc i) = fscons' n.+1 a2 v2 (fsucc i)

hypotheses.type: forall i0 : Fin (nat_pred n.+1), v1 i0 = v2 i0

forall v0 v3 : FinSeq (nat_pred n) A,
(forall i0 : Fin (nat_pred n), v0 i0 = v3 i0) ->
fscons' n a1 v0 i = fscons' n a2 v3 i

goals.conclusion: fscons' n.+1 a1 v1 (fsucc i) = v2 i

hypotheses.type: forall i0 : Fin (nat_pred n.+1), v1 i0 = v2 i0

forall v0 v3 : FinSeq (nat_pred n) A,
(forall i0 : Fin (nat_pred n), v0 i0 = v3 i0) ->
fscons' n a1 v0 i = fscons' n a2 v3 i

contents: exact (fstail'_beta_fscons' n.+1 a1 v1 i @ q i).

Definition path_fscons'_beta {A} (n : nat)
    (a : A) (v : FinSeq (nat_pred n) A) (i : Fin n)
    : path_fscons' n (idpath a) (fun j => idpath (v j)) i = idpath.

goals.conclusion: path_fscons' n 1 (fun j : Fin (nat_pred n) => 1) i = 1
path_fscons' n 1 (fun j : Fin (nat_pred n) => 1) i = 1

contents: induction i using fin_ind; unfold path_fscons'.

goals.conclusion:
fin_ind
  (fun (n0 : nat) (i : Fin n0) =>
   forall v1 v2 : FinSeq (nat_pred n0) A,
   (forall i0 : Fin (nat_pred n0), v1 i0 = v2 i0) ->
   fscons' n0 a v1 i = fscons' n0 a v2 i)
  (fun (n0 : nat) (v1 v2 : FinSeq (nat_pred n0.+1) A)
     (_ : forall i : Fin (nat_pred n0.+1), v1 i = v2 i) =>
   (fshead_beta_fscons a v1 @ 1) @ (fshead_beta_fscons a v2)^)
  (fun (n0 : nat) (i : Fin n0)
     (_ : forall v1 v2 : FinSeq (nat_pred n0) A,
          (forall i0 : Fin (nat_pred n0), v1 i0 = v2 i0) ->
          fscons' n0 a v1 i = fscons' n0 a v2 i)
     (v1 v2 : FinSeq (nat_pred n0.+1) A)
     (q : forall i0 : Fin (nat_pred n0.+1), v1 i0 = v2 i0) =>
   (fstail'_beta_fscons' n0.+1 a v1 i @ q i) @
   (fstail'_beta_fscons' n0.+1 a v2 i)^)
  fin_zero v v (fun j : Fin (nat_pred n.+1) => 1) =
1

fin_ind
  (fun (n0 : nat) (i0 : Fin n0) =>
   forall v1 v2 : FinSeq (nat_pred n0) A,
   (forall i1 : Fin (nat_pred n0), v1 i1 = v2 i1) ->
   fscons' n0 a v1 i0 = fscons' n0 a v2 i0)
  (fun (n0 : nat) (v1 v2 : FinSeq (nat_pred n0.+1) A)
     (_ : forall i0 : Fin (nat_pred n0.+1), v1 i0 = v2 i0) =>
   (fshead_beta_fscons a v1 @ 1) @ (fshead_beta_fscons a v2)^)
  (fun (n0 : nat) (i0 : Fin n0)
     (_ : forall v1 v2 : FinSeq (nat_pred n0) A,
          (forall i1 : Fin (nat_pred n0), v1 i1 = v2 i1) ->
          fscons' n0 a v1 i0 = fscons' n0 a v2 i0)
     (v1 v2 : FinSeq (nat_pred n0.+1) A)
     (q : forall i1 : Fin (nat_pred n0.+1), v1 i1 = v2 i1) =>
   (fstail'_beta_fscons' n0.+1 a v1 i0 @ q i0) @
   (fstail'_beta_fscons' n0.+1 a v2 i0)^)
  (fsucc i) v v (fun j : Fin (nat_pred n.+1) => 1) =
1

hypotheses.type:
forall v0 : FinSeq (nat_pred n) A,
path_fscons' n 1 (fun j : Fin (nat_pred n) => 1) i = 1

goals.conclusion:
fin_ind
  (fun (n0 : nat) (i : Fin n0) =>
   forall v1 v2 : FinSeq (nat_pred n0) A,
   (forall i0 : Fin (nat_pred n0), v1 i0 = v2 i0) ->
   fscons' n0 a v1 i = fscons' n0 a v2 i)
  (fun (n0 : nat) (v1 v2 : FinSeq (nat_pred n0.+1) A)
     (_ : forall i : Fin (nat_pred n0.+1), v1 i = v2 i) =>
   (fshead_beta_fscons a v1 @ 1) @ (fshead_beta_fscons a v2)^)
  (fun (n0 : nat) (i : Fin n0)
     (_ : forall v1 v2 : FinSeq (nat_pred n0) A,
          (forall i0 : Fin (nat_pred n0), v1 i0 = v2 i0) ->
          fscons' n0 a v1 i = fscons' n0 a v2 i)
     (v1 v2 : FinSeq (nat_pred n0.+1) A)
     (q : forall i0 : Fin (nat_pred n0.+1), v1 i0 = v2 i0) =>
   (fstail'_beta_fscons' n0.+1 a v1 i @ q i) @
   (fstail'_beta_fscons' n0.+1 a v2 i)^)
  fin_zero v v (fun j : Fin (nat_pred n.+1) => 1) =
1
(fshead_beta_fscons a v @ 1) @ (fshead_beta_fscons a v)^ = 1
fshead_beta_fscons a v @ (fshead_beta_fscons a v)^ = 1

fin_ind
  (fun (n0 : nat) (i0 : Fin n0) =>
   forall v1 v2 : FinSeq (nat_pred n0) A,
   (forall i1 : Fin (nat_pred n0), v1 i1 = v2 i1) ->
   fscons' n0 a v1 i0 = fscons' n0 a v2 i0)
  (fun (n0 : nat) (v1 v2 : FinSeq (nat_pred n0.+1) A)
     (_ : forall i0 : Fin (nat_pred n0.+1), v1 i0 = v2 i0) =>
   (fshead_beta_fscons a v1 @ 1) @ (fshead_beta_fscons a v2)^)
  (fun (n0 : nat) (i0 : Fin n0)
     (_ : forall v1 v2 : FinSeq (nat_pred n0) A,
          (forall i1 : Fin (nat_pred n0), v1 i1 = v2 i1) ->
          fscons' n0 a v1 i0 = fscons' n0 a v2 i0)
     (v1 v2 : FinSeq (nat_pred n0.+1) A)
     (q : forall i1 : Fin (nat_pred n0.+1), v1 i1 = v2 i1) =>
   (fstail'_beta_fscons' n0.+1 a v1 i0 @ q i0) @
   (fstail'_beta_fscons' n0.+1 a v2 i0)^)
  (fsucc i) v v (fun j : Fin (nat_pred n.+1) => 1) =
1

hypotheses.type:
forall v0 : FinSeq (nat_pred n) A,
path_fscons' n 1 (fun j : Fin (nat_pred n) => 1) i = 1

goals.conclusion:
(fstail'_beta_fscons' n.+1 a v i @ 1) @ (fstail'_beta_fscons' n.+1 a v i)^ =
1

hypotheses.type:
forall v0 : FinSeq (nat_pred n) A,
path_fscons' n 1 (fun j : Fin (nat_pred n) => 1) i = 1

goals.conclusion: fstail'_beta_fscons' n.+1 a v i @ (fstail'_beta_fscons' n.+1 a v i)^ = 1

hypotheses.type:
forall v0 : FinSeq (nat_pred n) A,
path_fscons' n 1 (fun j : Fin (nat_pred n) => 1) i = 1

contents:
Definition path_fscons `{Funext} {A} {n} {a1 a2 : A} (p : a1 = a2)
  {v1 v2 : FinSeq n A} (q : v1 = v2)
  : fscons a1 v1 = fscons a2 v2.

goals.conclusion: fscons a1 v1 = fscons a2 v2
fscons a1 v1 = fscons a2 v2
fscons a1 v1 i = fscons a2 v2 i
a1 = a2
forall i0 : Fin (nat_pred n.+1), v1 i0 = v2 i0
a1 = a2
forall i0 : Fin (nat_pred n.+1), v1 i0 = v2 i0
v1 j = v2 j

contents:
Lemma path_fscons_beta `{Funext} {A} {n} (a : A) (v : FinSeq n A)
  : path_fscons (idpath a) (idpath v) = idpath.

goals.conclusion: path_fscons 1 1 = 1
path_fscons 1 1 = 1

(fun i : Fin n.+1 =>
 path_fscons' n.+1 1 (fun j : Fin (nat_pred n.+1) => apD10 1 j) i) =
apD10 1
path_fscons' n.+1 1 (fun j : Fin (nat_pred n.+1) => apD10 1 j) i = apD10 1 i

contents:
(** The lemmas [path_expand_fscons_fscons'] and [path_expand_fscons_fscons]
    identify [path_expand_fscons'] with [path_fscons'] and
    [path_expand_fscons] with [path_fscons]. *)

Lemma path_expand_fscons_fscons' {A : Type} (n : nat)
  (N : n > 0) (a : A) (v : FinSeq (nat_pred n) A) (i : Fin n)
  : path_expand_fscons' n i N (fscons' n a v) =
    path_fscons' n (fshead'_beta_fscons' n N a v) (fstail'_beta_fscons' n a v) i.

goals.conclusion:
path_expand_fscons' n i N (fscons' n a v) =
path_fscons' n (fshead'_beta_fscons' n N a v) (fstail'_beta_fscons' n a v) i

path_expand_fscons' n i N (fscons' n a v) =
path_fscons' n (fshead'_beta_fscons' n N a v) (fstail'_beta_fscons' n a v) i

contents: induction i using fin_ind; unfold path_fscons', path_expand_fscons'.

goals.conclusion:
fin_ind
  (fun (n0 : nat) (i : Fin n0) =>
   forall (N0 : n0 > 0) (v0 : FinSeq n0 A),
   fscons' n0 (fshead' n0 N0 v0) (fstail' n0 v0) i = v0 i)
  (fun (n0 : nat) (_ : n0.+1 > 0) (v0 : FinSeq n0.+1 A) =>
   fshead_beta_fscons (v0 fin_zero) (fstail' n0.+1 v0))
  (fun (n0 : nat) (i : Fin n0)
     (_ : forall (N0 : n0 > 0) (v0 : FinSeq n0 A),
          fscons' n0 (fshead' n0 N0 v0) (fstail' n0 v0) i = v0 i)
     (_ : n0.+1 > 0) (v0 : FinSeq n0.+1 A) =>
   fstail'_beta_fscons' n0.+1 (fshead v0) (fstail v0) i)
  fin_zero N (fscons' n.+1 a v) =
fin_ind
  (fun (n0 : nat) (i : Fin n0) =>
   forall v1 v2 : FinSeq (nat_pred n0) A,
   (forall i0 : Fin (nat_pred n0), v1 i0 = v2 i0) ->
   fscons' n0 (fshead' n.+1 N (fscons' n.+1 a v)) v1 i = fscons' n0 a v2 i)
  (fun (n0 : nat) (v1 v2 : FinSeq (nat_pred n0.+1) A)
     (_ : forall i : Fin (nat_pred n0.+1), v1 i = v2 i) =>
   (fshead_beta_fscons (fshead' n.+1 N (fscons' n.+1 a v)) v1 @
    fshead'_beta_fscons' n.+1 N a v) @
   (fshead_beta_fscons a v2)^)
  (fun (n0 : nat) (i : Fin n0)
     (_ : forall v1 v2 : FinSeq (nat_pred n0) A,
          (forall i0 : Fin (nat_pred n0), v1 i0 = v2 i0) ->
          fscons' n0 (fshead' n.+1 N (fscons' n.+1 a v)) v1 i =
          fscons' n0 a v2 i)
     (v1 v2 : FinSeq (nat_pred n0.+1) A)
     (q : forall i0 : Fin (nat_pred n0.+1), v1 i0 = v2 i0) =>
   (fstail'_beta_fscons' n0.+1 (fshead' n.+1 N (fscons' n.+1 a v)) v1 i @ q i) @
   (fstail'_beta_fscons' n0.+1 a v2 i)^)
  fin_zero (fstail' n.+1 (fscons' n.+1 a v)) v
  (fstail'_beta_fscons' n.+1 a v)

fin_ind
  (fun (n0 : nat) (i0 : Fin n0) =>
   forall (N0 : n0 > 0) (v0 : FinSeq n0 A),
   fscons' n0 (fshead' n0 N0 v0) (fstail' n0 v0) i0 = v0 i0)
  (fun (n0 : nat) (_ : n0.+1 > 0) (v0 : FinSeq n0.+1 A) =>
   fshead_beta_fscons (v0 fin_zero) (fstail' n0.+1 v0))
  (fun (n0 : nat) (i0 : Fin n0)
     (_ : forall (N0 : n0 > 0) (v0 : FinSeq n0 A),
          fscons' n0 (fshead' n0 N0 v0) (fstail' n0 v0) i0 = v0 i0)
     (_ : n0.+1 > 0) (v0 : FinSeq n0.+1 A) =>
   fstail'_beta_fscons' n0.+1 (fshead v0) (fstail v0) i0)
  (fsucc i) N (fscons' n.+1 a v) =
fin_ind
  (fun (n0 : nat) (i0 : Fin n0) =>
   forall v1 v2 : FinSeq (nat_pred n0) A,
   (forall i1 : Fin (nat_pred n0), v1 i1 = v2 i1) ->
   fscons' n0 (fshead' n.+1 N (fscons' n.+1 a v)) v1 i0 = fscons' n0 a v2 i0)
  (fun (n0 : nat) (v1 v2 : FinSeq (nat_pred n0.+1) A)
     (_ : forall i0 : Fin (nat_pred n0.+1), v1 i0 = v2 i0) =>
   (fshead_beta_fscons (fshead' n.+1 N (fscons' n.+1 a v)) v1 @
    fshead'_beta_fscons' n.+1 N a v) @
   (fshead_beta_fscons a v2)^)
  (fun (n0 : nat) (i0 : Fin n0)
     (_ : forall v1 v2 : FinSeq (nat_pred n0) A,
          (forall i1 : Fin (nat_pred n0), v1 i1 = v2 i1) ->
          fscons' n0 (fshead' n.+1 N (fscons' n.+1 a v)) v1 i0 =
          fscons' n0 a v2 i0)
     (v1 v2 : FinSeq (nat_pred n0.+1) A)
     (q : forall i1 : Fin (nat_pred n0.+1), v1 i1 = v2 i1) =>
   (fstail'_beta_fscons' n0.+1 (fshead' n.+1 N (fscons' n.+1 a v)) v1 i0 @
    q i0) @
   (fstail'_beta_fscons' n0.+1 a v2 i0)^)
  (fsucc i) (fstail' n.+1 (fscons' n.+1 a v)) v
  (fstail'_beta_fscons' n.+1 a v)

hypotheses.type:
forall (N0 : n > 0) (v0 : FinSeq (nat_pred n) A),
path_expand_fscons' n i N0 (fscons' n a v0) =
path_fscons' n (fshead'_beta_fscons' n N0 a v0) (fstail'_beta_fscons' n a v0)
  i

goals.conclusion:
fin_ind
  (fun (n0 : nat) (i : Fin n0) =>
   forall (N0 : n0 > 0) (v0 : FinSeq n0 A),
   fscons' n0 (fshead' n0 N0 v0) (fstail' n0 v0) i = v0 i)
  (fun (n0 : nat) (_ : n0.+1 > 0) (v0 : FinSeq n0.+1 A) =>
   fshead_beta_fscons (v0 fin_zero) (fstail' n0.+1 v0))
  (fun (n0 : nat) (i : Fin n0)
     (_ : forall (N0 : n0 > 0) (v0 : FinSeq n0 A),
          fscons' n0 (fshead' n0 N0 v0) (fstail' n0 v0) i = v0 i)
     (_ : n0.+1 > 0) (v0 : FinSeq n0.+1 A) =>
   fstail'_beta_fscons' n0.+1 (fshead v0) (fstail v0) i)
  fin_zero N (fscons' n.+1 a v) =
fin_ind
  (fun (n0 : nat) (i : Fin n0) =>
   forall v1 v2 : FinSeq (nat_pred n0) A,
   (forall i0 : Fin (nat_pred n0), v1 i0 = v2 i0) ->
   fscons' n0 (fshead' n.+1 N (fscons' n.+1 a v)) v1 i = fscons' n0 a v2 i)
  (fun (n0 : nat) (v1 v2 : FinSeq (nat_pred n0.+1) A)
     (_ : forall i : Fin (nat_pred n0.+1), v1 i = v2 i) =>
   (fshead_beta_fscons (fshead' n.+1 N (fscons' n.+1 a v)) v1 @
    fshead'_beta_fscons' n.+1 N a v) @
   (fshead_beta_fscons a v2)^)
  (fun (n0 : nat) (i : Fin n0)
     (_ : forall v1 v2 : FinSeq (nat_pred n0) A,
          (forall i0 : Fin (nat_pred n0), v1 i0 = v2 i0) ->
          fscons' n0 (fshead' n.+1 N (fscons' n.+1 a v)) v1 i =
          fscons' n0 a v2 i)
     (v1 v2 : FinSeq (nat_pred n0.+1) A)
     (q : forall i0 : Fin (nat_pred n0.+1), v1 i0 = v2 i0) =>
   (fstail'_beta_fscons' n0.+1 (fshead' n.+1 N (fscons' n.+1 a v)) v1 i @ q i) @
   (fstail'_beta_fscons' n0.+1 a v2 i)^)
  fin_zero (fstail' n.+1 (fscons' n.+1 a v)) v
  (fstail'_beta_fscons' n.+1 a v)

fshead_beta_fscons (fscons' n.+1 a v fin_zero)
  (fstail' n.+1 (fscons' n.+1 a v)) =
(fshead_beta_fscons (fshead' n.+1 N (fscons' n.+1 a v))
   (fstail' n.+1 (fscons' n.+1 a v)) @
 fshead'_beta_fscons' n.+1 N a v) @
(fshead_beta_fscons a v)^

fshead_beta_fscons (fscons' n.+1 a v fin_zero)
  (fstail' n.+1 (fscons' n.+1 a v)) =
fshead_beta_fscons (fshead' n.+1 N (fscons' n.+1 a v))
  (fstail' n.+1 (fscons' n.+1 a v)) @
(fshead'_beta_fscons' n.+1 N a v @ (fshead_beta_fscons a v)^)

fshead_beta_fscons (fscons' n.+1 a v fin_zero)
  (fstail' n.+1 (fscons' n.+1 a v)) =
fshead_beta_fscons (fshead' n.+1 N (fscons' n.+1 a v))
  (fstail' n.+1 (fscons' n.+1 a v)) @
1

fin_ind
  (fun (n0 : nat) (i0 : Fin n0) =>

  (fun (n0 : nat) (_ : n0.+1 > 0) (v0 : FinSeq n0.+1 A) =>

  (fun (n0 : nat) (i0 : Fin n0)

     (_ : n0.+1 > 0) (v0 : FinSeq n0.+1 A) =>
   fstail'_beta_fscons' n0.+1 (fshead v0) (fstail v0) i0)
  (fsucc i) N (fscons' n.+1 a v) =
fin_ind
  (fun (n0 : nat) (i0 : Fin n0) =>
   forall v1 v2 : FinSeq (nat_pred n0) A,
   (forall i1 : Fin (nat_pred n0), v1 i1 = v2 i1) ->
   fscons' n0 (fshead' n.+1 N (fscons' n.+1 a v)) v1 i0 = fscons' n0 a v2 i0)
  (fun (n0 : nat) (v1 v2 : FinSeq (nat_pred n0.+1) A)
     (_ : forall i0 : Fin (nat_pred n0.+1), v1 i0 = v2 i0) =>
   (fshead_beta_fscons (fshead' n.+1 N (fscons' n.+1 a v)) v1 @
    fshead'_beta_fscons' n.+1 N a v) @
   (fshead_beta_fscons a v2)^)
  (fun (n0 : nat) (i0 : Fin n0)
     (_ : forall v1 v2 : FinSeq (nat_pred n0) A,
          (forall i1 : Fin (nat_pred n0), v1 i1 = v2 i1) ->
          fscons' n0 (fshead' n.+1 N (fscons' n.+1 a v)) v1 i0 =
          fscons' n0 a v2 i0)
     (v1 v2 : FinSeq (nat_pred n0.+1) A)
     (q : forall i1 : Fin (nat_pred n0.+1), v1 i1 = v2 i1) =>
   (fstail'_beta_fscons' n0.+1 (fshead' n.+1 N (fscons' n.+1 a v)) v1 i0 @
    q i0) @
   (fstail'_beta_fscons' n0.+1 a v2 i0)^)
  (fsucc i) (fstail' n.+1 (fscons' n.+1 a v)) v
  (fstail'_beta_fscons' n.+1 a v)

Lemma path_expand_fscons_fscons `{Funext}
  {A : Type} {n : nat} (a : A) (v : FinSeq n A)
  : path_expand_fscons (fscons a v) =
    path_fscons (fshead_beta_fscons a v) (fstail_beta_fscons a v).

goals.conclusion:
path_expand_fscons (fscons a v) =
path_fscons (fshead_beta_fscons a v) (fstail_beta_fscons a v)

path_expand_fscons (fscons a v) =
path_fscons (fshead_beta_fscons a v) (fstail_beta_fscons a v)

(fun i : Fin n.+1 => path_expand_fscons' n.+1 i (leq_add_r 1 n) (fscons a v)) =
(fun i : Fin n.+1 =>
 path_fscons' n.+1 (fshead_beta_fscons a v)
   (fun j : Fin (nat_pred n.+1) => apD10 (fstail_beta_fscons a v) j) i)

path_expand_fscons' n.+1 i (leq_add_r 1 n) (fscons a v) =
path_fscons' n.+1 (fshead_beta_fscons a v)
  (fun j : Fin (nat_pred n.+1) => apD10 (fstail_beta_fscons a v) j) i

contents: pose (p := eisretr apD10 (fstail'_beta_fscons' n.+1 a v)).

goals.conclusion:
path_expand_fscons' n.+1 i (leq_add_r 1 n) (fscons a v) =
path_fscons' n.+1 (fshead_beta_fscons a v)
  (fun j : Fin (nat_pred n.+1) => apD10 (fstail_beta_fscons a v) j) i

hypotheses.type:
(apD10 o apD10^-1) (fstail'_beta_fscons' n.+1 a v) =
idmap (fstail'_beta_fscons' n.+1 a v)

goals.conclusion:
path_expand_fscons' n.+1 i (leq_add_r 1 n) (fscons a v) =
path_fscons' n.+1 (fshead_beta_fscons a v) (fstail'_beta_fscons' n.+1 a v) i

hypotheses.type:
(apD10 o apD10^-1) (fstail'_beta_fscons' n.+1 a v) =
idmap (fstail'_beta_fscons' n.+1 a v)

(** The induction principle for finite sequence, [finseq_ind].
    Note that it uses funext and does not compute. *)

Lemma finseq_ind `{Funext} {A : Type} (P : forall n, FinSeq n A -> Type)
  (z : P 0 fsnil) (s : forall n a (v : FinSeq n A), P n v -> P n.+1 (fscons a v))
  {n : nat} (v : FinSeq n A)
  : P n v.

goals.conclusion: P n v

hypotheses.type: forall n0 : nat, FinSeq n0 A -> Type

forall (n0 : nat) (a : A) (v0 : FinSeq n0 A),
P n0 v0 -> P n0.+1 (fscons a v0)

goals.conclusion: P n v

hypotheses.type: forall n0 : nat, FinSeq n0 A -> Type

forall (n0 : nat) (a : A) (v0 : FinSeq n0 A),
P n0 v0 -> P n0.+1 (fscons a v0)

goals.conclusion: P 0 v

hypotheses.type: forall n : nat, FinSeq n A -> Type
forall (n : nat) (a : A) (v0 : FinSeq n A), P n v0 -> P n.+1 (fscons a v0)

goals.conclusion: P n.+1 v

hypotheses.type: forall n0 : nat, FinSeq n0 A -> Type

forall (n0 : nat) (a : A) (v0 : FinSeq n0 A),
P n0 v0 -> P n0.+1 (fscons a v0)
forall v0 : FinSeq n A, P n v0

goals.conclusion: P 0 v

hypotheses.type: forall n : nat, FinSeq n A -> Type
forall (n : nat) (a : A) (v0 : FinSeq n A), P n v0 -> P n.+1 (fscons a v0)

goals.conclusion: P n.+1 v

hypotheses.type: forall n0 : nat, FinSeq n0 A -> Type

forall (n0 : nat) (a : A) (v0 : FinSeq n0 A),
P n0 v0 -> P n0.+1 (fscons a v0)
forall v0 : FinSeq n A, P n v0

goals.conclusion: P n.+1 (fscons (fshead v) (fstail v))

hypotheses.type: forall n0 : nat, FinSeq n0 A -> Type

forall (n0 : nat) (a : A) (v0 : FinSeq n0 A),
P n0 v0 -> P n0.+1 (fscons a v0)
forall v0 : FinSeq n A, P n v0

goals.conclusion: P n (fstail v)

hypotheses.type: forall n0 : nat, FinSeq n0 A -> Type

forall (n0 : nat) (a : A) (v0 : FinSeq n0 A),
P n0 v0 -> P n0.+1 (fscons a v0)
forall v0 : FinSeq n A, P n v0

Lemma finseq_ind_beta_fsnil `{Funext} {A : Type}
  (P : forall n, FinSeq n A -> Type) (z : P 0 fsnil)
  (s : forall (n : nat) (a : A) (v : FinSeq n A), P n v -> P n.+1 (fscons a v))
  : finseq_ind P z s fsnil = z.

goals.conclusion: finseq_ind P z s fsnil = z

hypotheses.type: forall n : nat, FinSeq n A -> Type
forall (n : nat) (a : A) (v : FinSeq n A), P n v -> P n.+1 (fscons a v)

goals.conclusion: finseq_ind P z s fsnil = z

hypotheses.type: forall n : nat, FinSeq n A -> Type
forall (n : nat) (a : A) (v : FinSeq n A), P n v -> P n.+1 (fscons a v)

contents:
Lemma finseq_ind_beta_fscons `{Funext} {A : Type}
  (P : forall n, FinSeq n A -> Type) (z : P 0 fsnil)
  (s : forall (n : nat) (a : A) (v : FinSeq n A), P n v -> P n.+1 (fscons a v))
  {n : nat} (a : A) (v : FinSeq n A)
  : finseq_ind P z s (fscons a v) = s n a v (finseq_ind P z s v).

goals.conclusion: finseq_ind P z s (fscons a v) = s n a v (finseq_ind P z s v)

hypotheses.type: forall n0 : nat, FinSeq n0 A -> Type

forall (n0 : nat) (a0 : A) (v0 : FinSeq n0 A),
P n0 v0 -> P n0.+1 (fscons a0 v0)

goals.conclusion: finseq_ind P z s (fscons a v) = s n a v (finseq_ind P z s v)

hypotheses.type: forall n0 : nat, FinSeq n0 A -> Type

forall (n0 : nat) (a0 : A) (v0 : FinSeq n0 A),
P n0 v0 -> P n0.+1 (fscons a0 v0)

goals.conclusion:
transport (P n.+1) (path_expand_fscons (fscons a v))
  (s n (fshead (fscons a v)) (fstail (fscons a v))
     (finseq_ind P z s (fstail (fscons a v)))) =
s n a v (finseq_ind P z s v)

hypotheses.type: forall n0 : nat, FinSeq n0 A -> Type

forall (n0 : nat) (a0 : A) (v0 : FinSeq n0 A),
P n0 v0 -> P n0.+1 (fscons a0 v0)

goals.conclusion:
transport (P n.+1)
  (path_fscons (fshead_beta_fscons a v) (fstail_beta_fscons a v))
  (s n (fshead (fscons a v)) (fstail (fscons a v))
     (finseq_ind P z s (fstail (fscons a v)))) =
s n a v (finseq_ind P z s v)

hypotheses.type: forall n0 : nat, FinSeq n0 A -> Type

forall (n0 : nat) (a0 : A) (v0 : FinSeq n0 A),
P n0 v0 -> P n0.+1 (fscons a0 v0)

goals.conclusion:
transport (P n.+1) (path_fscons p1 (fstail_beta_fscons a v))
  (s n (fshead (fscons a v)) (fstail (fscons a v))
     (finseq_ind P z s (fstail (fscons a v)))) =
s n a v (finseq_ind P z s v)

hypotheses.type: forall n0 : nat, FinSeq n0 A -> Type

forall (n0 : nat) (a0 : A) (v0 : FinSeq n0 A),
P n0 v0 -> P n0.+1 (fscons a0 v0)

goals.conclusion:
transport (P n.+1) (path_fscons p1 p2)
  (s n (fshead (fscons a v)) (fstail (fscons a v))
     (finseq_ind P z s (fstail (fscons a v)))) =
s n a v (finseq_ind P z s v)

hypotheses.type: forall n0 : nat, FinSeq n0 A -> Type

forall (n0 : nat) (a0 : A) (v0 : FinSeq n0 A),
P n0 v0 -> P n0.+1 (fscons a0 v0)

goals.conclusion:
transport (P n.+1) (path_fscons 1 1)
  (s n (fshead (fscons a (fstail (fscons a v)))) (fstail (fscons a v))
     (finseq_ind P z s (fstail (fscons a v)))) =
s n (fshead (fscons a (fstail (fscons a v)))) (fstail (fscons a v))
  (finseq_ind P z s (fstail (fscons a v)))

hypotheses.type: forall n0 : nat, FinSeq n0 A -> Type

forall (n0 : nat) (a0 : A) (v0 : FinSeq n0 A),
P n0 v0 -> P n0.+1 (fscons a0 v0)
